subcodes.first_line: We send greetings to the True Friend and counsel as befitteth. Blessed is he that hath awakened from slumber [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست حقیقی را تکبیر میرسانیم و بما ینبغی وصیت مینمائیم طوبی لنائم انتبه من
subcodes.subjects: @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @chastisement and requital, @idle fancies; lust and passion, @call to action
